description: git-worktree-distance-raw outputs 0▮0 for a branch with no divergence from main
steps: Create a temp git repo with bats_git_dir
Create a linked worktree with bats_git_worktree
cd into the worktree (no extra commits)
Run git-worktree-distance-raw <branch>
Assert output is '0▮0' and exit status is 0

description: git-worktree-distance-raw outputs correct ahead count when branch has commits not in main
steps: Create a temp git repo with bats_git_dir
Create a linked worktree with bats_git_worktree
cd into the worktree, make 2 empty commits
Run git-worktree-distance-raw <branch> from inside the repo
Assert first field (ahead) is '2' and second field (behind) is '0'

description: git-worktree-distance-raw outputs correct behind count when main has commits not in branch
steps: Create a temp git repo with bats_git_dir
Create a linked worktree with bats_git_worktree
cd into main repo, make 3 empty commits
cd into the worktree
Run git-worktree-distance-raw <branch>
Assert first field (ahead) is '0' and second field (behind) is '3'

description: git-worktree-distance-raw exits 1 when called outside a git repo
steps: cd into a non-git temp directory
Run git-worktree-distance-raw somebranch
Assert exit status is 1

description: complete-git-worktrees includes dirty count in description when non-zero
steps: Create a temp git repo with bats_git_dir
Create a linked worktree with bats_git_worktree
cd into the linked worktree, create an untracked file
cd back to the main repo
Run complete-git-worktrees
Assert output contains the worktree branch name followed by ':' and a dirty indicator

description: complete-git-worktrees suppresses zero counts in description
steps: Create a temp git repo with bats_git_dir
Create a linked worktree with bats_git_worktree (no extra commits, no dirty files)
cd into the main repo
Run complete-git-worktrees
Assert the description for the worktree does not contain dirty/ahead/behind indicators

description: complete-git-worktrees outputs main as first entry with no description when outside a git repo
steps: cd into a non-git temp directory
Run complete-git-worktrees
Assert exit status is 0
Assert output is exactly 'main'

description: complete-git-worktrees output is in name:description format
steps: Create a temp git repo with bats_git_dir
Create a linked worktree with bats_git_worktree
cd into the main repo
Run complete-git-worktrees
Assert each non-main line contains ':' separating name from description
